libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system property setup is indicated. If tests exercise WebAppClassLoader directly, update the test code for Jetty 9.4.0.RC1: Context now uses isSystemClass(Class<?>) and isServerClass(Class<?>) and also requires isServerResource(String, URL) and isSystemResource(String, URL). Prefer constructing a real WebAppContext with a temporary WEB-INF/web.xml/static webapp for coverage where possible.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: jetty-jmx is an optional dependency and should only be added if tests intentionally cover JMX behavior.
Jetty distribution/demo-base style tests may require jetty.home/jetty.base, but embedded WebAppContext coverage does not.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative for any old-Jetty-on-JDK-25 runtime issues.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed for meaningful jetty-webapp coverage; the reported failure is caused by a Jetty 9.4.0.RC1 WebAppClassLoader.Context API change, not missing setup.
